title: Algebra I - Chapter 1 Quiz
text:
Algebra I: Chapter 1 Quiz


Part A: Simplifying Expressions

Simplify: \(3(x + 5) - 2(2x - 1)\)
Simplify: \(\frac{12a^{2}b}{4ab}\)
Combine terms: \(5y^{2} + 3y - 2(y^{2} - y)\)




Part B: Solving Equations

Solve for \(x\): \[4x - 7 = 13\]
Solve for \(w\): \[2(w + 4) = 5w - 1\]
Solve for \(x\): \[\frac{x}{3} + 5 = 11\]




Part C: Inequalities & Factoring

Solve: \(3z + 4 \leq 19\)
Factor completely: \[x^{2} + 5x + 6\]




Part D: Word Problem

A taxi service charges a flat fee of $5.00 plus \(2.50 per mile (\)m$). If the total bill was \(25.00, write and solve the equation:\)\(5 + 2.50m = 25\)$
